description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming console with a clamshell design, featuring two rectangular screens, one on the upper half and one on the lower half. The lower half contains a set of physical controls, including a circular joystick, a directional pad, and four colored action buttons, as well as additional smaller buttons. The exterior is primarily matte black plastic, with some colored accents on the buttons and a white slider on the side. The hinge mechanism allows the device to open and close, protecting the screens when not in use. The device is compact and portable, designed to be held in both hands during operation. Its overall appearance suggests durability and ease of use for gaming on the go.
description: A compact, black clamshell handheld gaming console with dual screens and colorful physical controls. Designed for portable gaming with a sturdy hinge and ergonomic layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing both screens, the main control buttons, joystick, and colored action buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the hinge, the thickness of the device, and the side slider.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the slim profile and the alignment of the two halves when open.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the joystick, directional pad, and the colored buttons from a different perspective.
